tech.nodes.title: Supersonic Flight

tech.nodes.title: Adv. Fuel Systems

tech.nodes.title: Precision Propulsion
tech.nodes.description: Any level of precision achieved in controlling the sustained explosion inside a rocket engine is nothing short of remarkable. It might be quite expensive, too.

tech.nodes.title: Advanced Aerodynamics
tech.nodes.description: Advances in fluid dynamics research technology have allowed development of a new set of streamlined aircraft components, And also these parts here.

tech.nodes.title: Heavy Landing
tech.nodes.description: A good landing is one where you walk away from it. A great landing is one where you get to use the aircraft again.

tech.nodes.title: Field Science
tech.nodes.description: Freedom to roam as far as curiosity will take you, or as long as batteries last.

tech.nodes.title: High Altitude Flight
tech.nodes.description: New breakthroughs in engine and intake development to enable flying through the upper reaches of the atmosphere.

tech.nodes.title: Large Volume Containment
tech.nodes.description: Maximize the payload capacity of your spacecraft by maximizing the size of your spacecraft.

tech.nodes.title: Composites
tech.nodes.description: Lightweight and strong! and don't worry, we're sure the glue will dry off in no time.

tech.nodes.title: Electronics
tech.nodes.description: Hopefully these won't become obsolete in the next couple of months.

tech.nodes.title: Heavy Aerodynamics
tech.nodes.description: Advances in construction technology enabled new breakthroughs in aerospace materials.

tech.nodes.title: Ion Propulsion
tech.nodes.description: Turns out, it's not science fiction.

parts.name: toroidalAerospike
parts.title: T-1 Toroidal Aerospike "Dart" Liquid Fuel Engine

tech.nodes.title: Hypersonic Flight
tech.nodes.description: Push your aircraft to the upper limits of airspeed and sanity.

tech.nodes.title: Nanolathing
tech.nodes.description: Despite the threatening appearance of the green metablobs shot out of the Nanolathing Injectors, none can argue the fact that Kerbals have indeed developed technologies at least just as dangerous as this one.

parts.name: scansat-multi-msi-1
parts.title: MS-2A Advanced Multispectral Scanner
parts.manufacturer: SCAN: Scientific Committee on Advanced Navigation

tech.nodes.title: Advanced Unmanned Tech
tech.nodes.description: Improvements in remote control technology for a new generation of probe designs.

tech.nodes.title: Meta-Materials
tech.nodes.description: An advancement in spacecraft construction so revolutionary, you won't even mind that its naming was wildly inaccurate.

tech.nodes.title: Very Heavy Rocketry
tech.nodes.description: While ever-larger rockets may not be the answer every time, for all other times, we've developed these.

tech.nodes.title: Advanced Science Tech
tech.nodes.description: Scientific advancements allow new advanced technologies for advancing Science.

tech.nodes.title: Advanced Motors
tech.nodes.description: Wheel technology is just rolling along now. You could even say our engineers are on a roll with it.

tech.nodes.title: Specialized Electrics
tech.nodes.description: Experience the warm glow of the latest in electrical technology. Figuratively, of course, and maybe also quite literally as well. Actually, try to avoid direct exposure.

tech.nodes.title: High-Performance Fuel Systems
tech.nodes.description: Massive engines require massive fuel storage solutions.

tech.nodes.title: Experimental Aerodynamics
tech.nodes.description: Winged flight technology is soaring to unprecedented heights. It could even be said that it's properly taking off now.

tech.nodes.title: Automation
tech.nodes.description: We can't think of anything that could go wrong with letting an experimental AI handle every aspect of a mission.

tech.nodes.title: Large Probes

tech.nodes.title: Experimental Science
tech.nodes.description: Explore novel fields of science that we didn't even know were there.

tech.nodes.title: Experimental Motors
tech.nodes.description: The latest breakthroughs that are driving motor technology forwards, and in reverse, and steering too.

parts.title: SAR-L Antenna

tech.nodes.title: Experimental Electrics
tech.nodes.description: The very latest in electrical systems technology. Our engineers are buzzing with excitement over it. They also seem to glow in the dark now. Fascinating!
